name: Talmora Diamond Inc.
summary: Talmora Diamond Inc. explores for and evaluates mineral exploration properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for diamonds. It holds interests in Horton River project consisting of five prospecting permits covering 142,118.28 hectares and 30 claims covering 2,570.88 hectares on the Horton River area, south of Paulatuk in the Northwest Territories. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
